recommendations.title: Search Party
recommendations.overview: Two oafs must rescue their stranded pal in Mexico.

recommendations.title: Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An orphaned dinosaur raised by lemurs joins an arduous trek to a sancturary after a meteorite shower destroys his family home.

recommendations.title: Love Life
recommendations.overview: Taeko and her husband, Jirō, are living a peaceful existence with her young son, Keita, when a tragic accident brings the boy's long-lost father, Park, back into her life. To cope with the pain and guilt, Taeko throws herself into helping this deaf a

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: Rim of the World
recommendations.overview: Stranded at a summer camp when aliens attack the planet, four teens with nothing in common embark on a perilous mission to save the world.

recommendations.title: Inkheart
recommendations.overview: The adventures of a father and his young daughter, in their search for a long lost book that will help reunite a missing, close relative.

recommendations.title: Detective Chinatown
recommendations.overview: After being rejected from the police college, a mannerly man travels to Bangkok where he and an energetic distant relative must solve a murder case.

recommendations.title: Rafiki
recommendations.overview: Kena and Ziki long for something more. Despite the political rivalry between their families, the girls resist and remain close friends, supporting each other to pursue their dreams in a conservative society. When love blossoms between them, the two g

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas
recommendations.overview: The Doctor and Clara face their Last Christmas. Trapped on an Arctic base, under attack from terrifying creatures, who are you going to call? Santa Claus!
